title: Pyro... The Thing Without a Face
writer: Sidney W. Pink, Luis de los Arcos
actors: Barry Sullivan, Martha Hyer, Sherry Moreland
plot: A married man has a brief affair, then goes back to his wife and children. His jilted mistress, believing that if he had no more family he'd come back to her, sets fire to his house, hoping to kill them. The man, unsuccessfully tr...
